title: The Sand-Sand Clan
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on the sand-sand clan, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Sand-Sand Clan. Vivi’s childhood bond with Koza and the roots of the rebel movement give the civil war a personal face. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't you dare look down on the sand- sand gang!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now get out of this city and never come back!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's enough, kid. Pipe down and hand over the girl...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You wouldn't want to anger a grown-up if you know what's good for ya...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We'll die protecting VIVI if we have to!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Hey, this kid just knocked out our boss...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Can't believe this... Well let's just kill him and get this over with.

summary: This part develops the sand-sand clan and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
